segment-text: Phil Lord & Chris Miller Based on the children's book Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs Judi and Ron Barrett Sony Pictures Animation
Culver City, CA 90232

CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS ON THE COLUMBIA TORCH LADY. AS CLOUDS BEHIND HER ROIL, SHE IS SUDDENLY KNOCKED OVER BY A GIANT PLUMMETING BANANA. CHYRONS OVER BLACK: COLUMBIA PICTURES PRESENTS A SONY PICTURES ANIMATION FILM A FILM BY... A LOT OF PEOPLE
EXT. SWALLOW FALLS - DAY
Push down through the clouds to the island town of Swallow Falls, and down into the elementary school classroom.
Have you ever felt like you were a little bit different? Like you had something unique to offer the world, if you could just get people to see it? Then you know exactly how it felt...
INT. CLASSROOM - DAY
PUSH IN on a raised hand from the back of the classroom. This is YOUNG FLINT. 8, unkempt hair, "frogs!" T-shirt.
...To be me.
Go ahead, Flint.
Young Flint steps to the front and addresses the class.
(NERVOUSLY) What is the number one problem facing our community today? Untied shoelaces.
The children, all with untied shoelaces, stare at him.
Which is why I've invented a laceless alternative foot covering, Spray-On Shoes.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS He sprays the can on his feet. The other kids look
Wow! / Whoa! Voila!
Then, the class bully, YOUNG BRENT, pipes up.
How're you gonna get 'em off, nerd?
Uh-oh. The kids LAUGH as young Flint tugs and strains to take off the shoes, but they won't come off.
What a geek! He wants to be smart, but that's lame!
On Flint, flailing, upset.
EXT. SWALLOW FALLS - STREET - LATER
Flint runs down the empty street, crying in the rain.
I wanted to run away that day... but you can't run away from your own feet.
INT. FLINT'S BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS

Flint, SNIFFLING, tries to BITE his shoes off, but it does nothing. Then he pulls out a SCREWDRIVER. It breaks in half. SCISSORS bend around his foot. A CINDER BLOCK cracks in half. These things are indestructible.
INT. HALLWAY - CONTINUOUS
TIM, Flint's gruff blue-collar dad, and FRAN, his warm mother, approach the door. Fran gestures for Tim to speak.
Uh... Not every sardine jumps in the net, son.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
I don't understand fishing metaphors!
Flint flops on the bed.
What did I say?
Don't worry.
Fran opens the door.
Honey, I think your shoes are wonderful.
She enters and sits on the bed as Flint hides his face in his pillow.
Everyone just thinks I'm a weirdo.
Fran gestures to Flint's wall of posters of great inventors: Tesla, Farnsworth, Edison, etc.
So? People probably thought that these guys were weirdos too! But that never stopped them. (THEN) I was saving this for your birthday, but, here...
With a sly smile she holds up an adult-size LAB COAT.
(GASPS) A professional-grade lab coat. Just like the real guys wear! He puts it on. It's way too big for him.
It fits perfect.
The world needs your originality, Flint. You just have to grow into it. And I know that you're gonna do big things someday.

Flint gives her a smile and hugs her, inspired. Flint draws a poster of himself in the lab coat with the words "BEST INVENTOR EVER." He slaps it on the wall. Then he runs out of the house and up into his tree house lab where he starts on a new project.
From that moment on, I was determined to invent something great.
VIDEO DIARIES: We see Flint and some of his many inventions through the years... CHYRON: REMOTE CONTROL TV
Remote Control Television!
He pushes a button. The TV gets up and walks over to Tim on the couch, who clicks it on...
Eventually.
Then the TV quickly KICKS down the door and runs away amid frightened pedestrians. CHYRON: HAIR UN-BALDER
Hair unbalder!
Flint pours a hair tonic on Tim's head. Hair POOFS out suddenly, completely covering his face like a wolfman. Tim and Flint SCREAM. CHYRON: FLYING CAR
Flying car!
A car with rockets attached shoots off from the docks, but dives straight down into the water. CHYRON: MONKEY THOUGHT TRANSLATOR
Monkey Thought Translator.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
In his father's tackle shop, Flint shows off STEVE, a vervet monkey with a device strapped to his chest and head.
Hungry! Hungryhungryhungryhungry!
How wise-- No, Steve! no, no, no-- No,
Steve goes on a rampage, knocking over shelves, scaring customers, and pulling a chunk of Tim's moustache off. CHYRON: RAT-BIRDS
Rat-birds. (TO RATBIRDS) Hey,
what's going on, little guys-RAT-BIRDS, half-rat, half-parrot, all-disturbing, escape from
ON A MAP OF THE ATLANTIC
My dream was to help my home town, a tiny island hidden under the 'A' in Atlantic...
ZOOM IN to see the island is barely visible under the "A".
EXT. SWALLOW FALLS - DAY
Wide on the rundown town.
The cannery is abandoned and in

...called Swallow Falls. We were famous for sardines. Until the day the Baby Brent Sardine Cannery closed for good, right after everyone in the world realized that sardines are super gross. Soon, all of us were stuck eating the sardines that no one else wanted. INSERT SHOTS of sardines, prepared in different unappetizing ways.
Poached, fried, boiled, dried, candied, and juiced.
Life became gray and flavorless. But when all seemed lost, I stared at defeat...
TIGHT on Flint's face, eyes widening:
...and found hope.
TITLE CARD: CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS.
INT. FLINT'S LAB - DAY

We see a shadowy figure walking through an awesome, futuristic lab full of glowing lights and machinery. This is grown-up FLINT LOCKWOOD, still in his labcoat, still wearing those spray-on shoes. He stops to look at the posters of great inventors on a wall just like in his old bedroom 15 years ago.
My name is Flint Lockwood, and I was about to invent a machine that turns water... into food.
He turns into the light, dramatically.
Steve, my best friend and trusted colleague! Reveal a STEVE the MONKEY. contraption says: Steve.
Can I count on your help? Steve holds up a sardine can, offering. Can.
I knew I could!
This initiates an AWESOME BUILDING MONTAGE! Flint pushes a button.
Exciting MUSIC!
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
He starts a reel to reel recorder.
Memory activate. He draws blueprints.
Blueprints... awesome!
He creates a contained NUCLEAR EXPLOSION.
Begin nano-mutation.
He lowers a disco ball into a microwave.
Radiation matrix secure. He uses a computer mouse.
Computer, boot!
He draws sci-fi lines on the machine.
Coolness enhancement complete!
EXCITING MUSIC STOPS. Flint and Steve SIP COFFEE on a break.
Engage coffee break. Long beat, then... MUSIC'S BACK!
Flint plugs in two cords.
Networking power grid! He then plugs many cords into many surge protectors and plugs
the last one into the finished machine, clearly made out of a
Beginning conversion of water into food.
Flint pours water into the top.
Hydrating protein matrix.
He flips switches and turns knobs on the machine.
Calibrating flavor panel.
He tightens a screw on the bottom of the machine.
Priming Chow Plopper. He types into his computer.
Uploading cool machine voice.
Cheeseburger.
He flips on a switch and
Everyone is going to love this.

Flint waits hopefully as the Chow Plopper bulges bigger and bigger... A cheeseburger-shaped CLOUD forms slowly above a plate at the bottom, becoming more and more like a real cheeseburger. It's at 60%... 70%... 80%... 90%... A HUGE SPARK shocks Flint! Aaaaaaaah!
FLINT (CONT'D)
Almost instantly, a power surge goes up through the cables and out the lab. Power goes out.
INT. TIM'S LIVING ROOM - MORNING
Tim sits on the couch, reading the paper. EXPLODE at once. Black.
All the appliances
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
EXT. NEIGHBORHOOD - CONTINUOUS
Power's out on Tim's house and Flint's backyard LAB which is an enormous metal version of his childhood treehouse lab. FLINT!!!
Sorry, Dad!
INT. FLINT'S LAB - CONTINUOUS
On his way out, Flint passes Steve, who bangs a pipe against a metal bucket.
Steve, keep working.
HUMMING AN IMAGINARY SOUNDTRACK (the same as the full orchestra one playing in the previous scene), Flint runs up to a vault-like door and puts his hand up to a fake looking scanner.
Scanning hand.
Making his own sound effects, he presses a button and the door opens into a large empty hallway. Approaching the doorway at the other end, Flint inputs the code on his Simon.
(BEEPING NOISES)
After a few more of his own sound effects he opens the door to the elevator and heads down.
EXT. FLINT'S LAB - CONTINUOUS

FLINT makes ELEVATOR NOISES as he heads down the pneumatic tube elevator from the top of his lab to the ground. The tube goes under the ground and then pops up inside a Port-APotty. Flint exits and runs over to the house while still humming the imaginary soundtrack. Neighbor kids watch and laugh, including CAL, 8.
That's a really weird dude.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
INT. TIM'S HOUSE - CONTINUOUS
Flint enters through the back door.
Reenergizing power unit. (SOUND EFFECTS)
Flint opens the FUSE BOX. behind him, arms crossed.
Twiddles... Lights go ON. Tim is Flint turns and is surprised.
Jeez.
He backs into the fuse box and FALLS DOWN. and starts to leave, nervously. He pops back up
See you, dad.
EXT. TIM'S BACKYARD - CONTINUOUS
Flint goes back out towards his lab. where Steve bangs on stuff. Tim follows outside,
Flint, um... er... don't you think it's time to give up this inventing thing and get a real job? Fint stops. No, why?
Well, all your technology stuff, it just ends in disaster.
The ratbirds, yes, they escaped and bred at a surprising rate, but I took care of that problem and disposed of them.
Behind Flint, three RAT-BIRDS descend, pick up a neighbor kid, and fly away with him, SCREAMING.
Billy, just play dead!
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Flint, you don't keep throwing your net where there aren't any fish. What?
I want you to work full time at the tackle shop.
The tackle shop?! Aww, Dad, no!
Tackle is a good career.
As Flint pleads with his dad, Steve climbs up on Tim's shoulder and reaches for his moustache. Tim's uncomfortable.

Please, I'm so close with this one. I just have to hook it up to the power station and give it more power and it'll work, and then you can sell food in the shop, and then everyone won't have to eat sardines anymore. It is going to be so awesome.
Tim removes Steve and DROPS him. Time to lay down the law.
I'm sorry, son. Ouch.
No more inventing.
Tim turns to go inside.
Dad. I know I can do this. (THEN) And Mom did too. Tim freezes but doesn't turn.
He knows he crossed the line. Flint looks at him guiltily.
It had been almost ten years since mom died, and Dad still didn't understand me like she did.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS Flint tries to take back what he said. Dad, I--
Come on, let's open the shop.
And he walks off.
EXT. TACKLE SHOP - DAY
Tim excitedly unveils an "AND SON" sign added to "TIM'S SARDINE BAIT & TACKLE".
Tim and Son Sardine Bait and Tackle. You feelin' it?
(TRYING) Mmm-hmm.
Tim walks in, happy, as he enters the store and Flint MOPES and he follows him inside.
EXT. SWALLOW FALLS - DAY
TV COMMERCIAL: A cartoon baby tips over a wagon of sardines.
Look out, Baby Brent! Uh-oh!
Baby Brent Sardines. TV ANNOUNCER #2 (V.O.)
Hand-packed in Swallow Fall-The crude animation of the commercial freezes and the MAYOR walks in front of the frozen image.
As your mayor, I know it's time to put our sardine canning past behind us. And look to the future: Sardine Tourism!
A cheesy graphic: shots of town. "TOURISM!" over four different crappy
That's why without consulting anyone, I spent the entire town budget on the thing that is under this tarp. Which I will be unveiling today at nooon!
Featuring a live appearance by Baby Brent himself--! Another cheesy graphic spins at camera: "NOON!"
INT. TACKLESHOP - DAY

Reveal we are watching the Mayor's commercial on a TV in the shop as Flint stacks Baby Brent Sardine cans listlessly. He is not wearing his labcoat. There are a couple old-timers (JOE TOWN and RUFUS) in the shop eating sardines, also watching the TV. Flint sighs. "BABY" BRENT enters. Flint's longtime bully, and the town's only celebrity, Brent has let himself go. He's overweight, lazy, and wears a baby blue track suit with "BB" embroidered on it. He has a lady on each arm.
What is up, everybody?
Hey! / Hey, it's Baby Brent!
(TO FLINT) Whatcha doin'? Stacking cans with me on 'em as a baby? Uhoh!
He does the Baby Brent pose, knocking over some of the cans Flint just stacked. The old timers love it, LAUGHING.
(ANNOYED) Hi Baby Brent.
(LAUGHS) Anyways, who wants to watch me cut the ribbon at the Mayor's unveiling thing? I'll be using these bad boys to help save the town.
He shows off a pair of huge golden scissors. Rufus OOH.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Boy-yo! (AS HE EXITS) Alright you guys! Sardines! Yeah! Swallow Falls Forever!
Oh, what a rascal.
Flint frowns as he watches Brent and his posse exit past the window. Tim approaches Flint from the back room as the Old-Timers leave.
Listen, you, uh... Maybe you wanna go to that unveiling?
Flint thinks for a beat. Then:
(CASUAL) You know, Dad, why don't you go ahead. I'll hold down the fort here.
(PLEASANTLY SURPRISED) Really? sure you can handle it?
Yeah, Dad, I'm pretty sure I'll be fine.
Huh. Alright, then. I'll be back in half an hour, skipper.
Okay, byeeee.
Tim leaves. Flint looks around sneakily then runs away HUMMING HIS SOUNDTRACK again. He grabs his lab coat on the way out.
EXT. SARDINE CIRCLE - MOMENTS LATER
Backstage, the Mayor grabs the chain link fence, tense. Brent sits behind him, eating sardines out of a tin.
This hell hole's too small for me, Brent. I want to be big. (MORE)
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS

I want people to look at me and say, "That is one big mayor." That's why this has to work. It has to work! Otherwise, I'm just a tiny mayor of a tiny town full of tiny sardine-sucking knucklescrapers.
Brent's knuckles are scraping the ground, mouth full of fish.
But not me, right?
Oh, not you, Brent, no. You've always been like a son to me. The Mayor rolls his eyes.
The Mayor bounds on stage and up to the microphone.
(POSITIVE) Hey, hey everybody! REVEAL there are like 20 people there.
Under this tarp is the greatest tourist attraction ever built by humans!
REVEAL Flint and Steve tiptoeing towards the power station, carrying his machine.
It just needs seventeen thousand more gigajoules. Go, go, go, go, go, go, go!
Flint makes a break for it but is STOPPED immediately by EARL, an overzealous cop who plays by the rules. He hides the machine behind his back.
What are you doing, Flint Lockwood?
Just holding my hands behind my back respectfully, sir.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
You know what you are, Flint Lockwood? FLINT No.
A shenaniganizer! A tomfool! You see my beautiful angel son, Cal? Cal is there.
And he brought his attitude.
I love him so much. This is my only son. I want him to have a bright future. A future in which you don't ruin our town's day with one of your crazy science doodleybopper thingies.
Well, you know, that's all behind me-EARL You see this contact lens, Flint
He holds a contact lens. Mm-hmm.
This contact lens represent you. Alright.
And my eye represents my eye. Okay.
He very deliberately puts the contact on his eye.
I got my eye... on... you.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Oh, my gosh, a jaywalker. Hey!
Earl RUNS down the street and tackles the jaywalker. OOF!
And I've arranged for live coverage from a major network and their most experienced professional reporter!
EXT. NEW YORK CITY
Oh, just send the intern.
INT. WEATHER NEWS NETWORK SET - YESTERDAY
A cute young intern, SAM SPARKS, delivers coffee to the crew members on set. The PRODUCER and PRODUCTION COORDINATOR stand in the foreground.
She's cute and she's super perky.
Well, those are the only things we look for in a TV weather person. Intern! How would you like to do a weather report from a rinky-dink island in the middle of the ocean as a favor to my cousin?
Sam, excited, drops her tray of coffees on the ground. Really?!
EXT. NEW YORK - DAY
Sam drives the weathervan, with her silent but adept cameraman MANNY in the passenger seat. CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Can you believe it, Manny? Temporary professional meteorologist. Woo!
Manny holds the wheel as she gestures.
EXT. OCEAN - DAY
Sam and Manny are sitting in their van as it travels on a ferry across the ocean.

Okay, Manny what about this? (PRACTICING) Welcome, America, I'm Sam Sparks. Hello, America, Sam Sparks here. America, hi, I didn't see you there. It's me, Sam Sparks. (THEN, EXCITED) On my way! Across the ocean!
EXT. SARDINE CIRCLE - TODAY
AT THE POWER STATION, Flint creeps past DANGER! ELECTRICITY! signs. The Mayor DRONES ON in the background.
Now, when she gets here, I want to see a lot of smiling faces...
Flint looks up at the huge, scary electrical tower.
This is a great idea.
EXT. SARDINE CIRCLE - MOMENTS LATER
ON TV: The WNN logo.
WNN PRODUCER (V.O.)
The well-coiffed WNN ANCHOR speaks to camera. INSET is Sam, in front of the growing crowd at Swallow Falls' town center. CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Now we're over to Swallow Falls where our intern is on her first day on the job. Or should I say first gray on the job, looks pretty cloudy there, intern? Beat.
(WHISPERING UNDER ANCHOR) Hello, America, I'm Sam Sparks. Hello, America, I'm
Sam Sparks. Sam is extremely nervous.
Hello, Sam Sparks, I'm America. It's Swallow Falls degrees... and, uh, let's just go to the mayor.
She gestures to the mayor, who addresses the excited crowd.
Thank you and welcome national television audience!

AT THE POWER STATION, we sees QUICK CUTS of Flint connecting lots of jumper cables together on the electrical tower. We PAN UP to the top of the electrical tower over scary zapping coils to find Flint at the very top STRUGGLING to connect one last cable -- and he's ELECTROCUTED and falls to the ground. YAHHH!!!
ON THE MAYOR.
And now, here to cut the ceremonial ribbon, Swallow Falls' favorite son, Baby Brent!
Brent walks on stage from behind a curtain and RIPS OFF his tracksuit, revealing a DIAPER.
He's still got it, folks!
Yeah! Hahaha! I'm the best person in the whole town!
The crowd APPLAUDS. He makes his SIGNATURE POSE, knocking over a wagon of sardines, and the crowd goes nuts. Uh-oh!
BACK AT THE POWER STATION, we see run back to his machine. He raises the jumper cables high, about to attach them...
Food synthesis go! ON EARL in the crowd with his WIFE and son CAL. Suddenly he jolts to attention. He looks down.
My chest hairs are tingling. Something's wrong.
Earl acrobatically flips away toward the power station. ON THE MAYOR.
So here it is, the attraction the whole world has been waiting for-SardineLand!
Brent cuts the ribbon with the giant scissors and the tarp falls, revealing a small Sea World-like THEME PARK. Applause. ON THE ATTRACTIONS as each tarp falls.
With rides! And exhibits! And featuring Shamo! The world's largest sardine, and his flaming hoop of glory!
Amid a few rides and booths is SHAMO, a TINY FISH in a VERY LARGE BOWL, with a ring of fire to jump through. Shamo does not look excited about the ring of fire.
Those of you in the Splash Zone, look out!
ON JOE TOWNE in the front row of the bleachers, where ONE SEAT is marked "SPLASH ZONE." Yeah!
ON EARL, doing OVERZEALOUS ACTION COP POSES. and GASPS. He sees Flint ON FLINT, who finally connects the cables to the machine. CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Cheeseburger.
It starts to power up and Flint looks excited.
Flint Lockwood!
Flint turns and sees Earl running.
Uh, just a second! I'm in the middle of a yaaaaah!
A SPARK sends the machine SHOOTING off horizontally like a missile, with Flint dragged behind it, hanging on to jumper cables for dear life.
Yeeeeeeeeeeeaaaaghgh!
ON MANNY AND SAM, broadcasting, unaware of the danger. SAM (ON TV)
For-WHAM! The machine knocks Manny's camera into Sam, Flint flies over. The lens smooshes right up against her face. She looks ridiculous.
<*SMOOSHED FACE NOISES*>
INT. WNN STUDIO - CONTINUOUS
The Anchor looks at Sam's smooshed face in shock.
WNN ANCHOR EXT. SARDINE CIRCLE - DAY
Flint looks back as the machine rockets him away from Sam.
Aah, sorry!
The machine (and Flint) whips into Sardine Land, knocks around out Shamo's fish bowl scaffolding, and ricochets back.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS

And time SLOWS DOWN as the machine and Flint pass by Tim. Tim SCOWLS. Oops. Flint STRUGGLES to stop the machine by planting his feet, waterskiing on his spray-on shoes, tearing up the sidewalk, and is finally stopped by a STOP sign. The machine breaks away from the jumper cables and shoots up, disappearing into the sky. Flint looks up at the machine he lost...
FLINT (CONT'D)
And he's tackled by Earl.
You're under arrest, Flint Lockwood. Thank goodness you only caused minimal damage to SardineLand. But behind them, there's a noise.
bowl scaffolding...
They both look at Shamo's KRAAAAAAK! The scaffolding breaks, the fish bowl topples over and SPLASHES its water everywhere but the Splash Zone.
Oh, come on!

The bowl starts to roll around the town like a giant wheel of desruction. ON THE SARDINE MUSEUM, which is SMASHED by the bowl. ON THE VIRTUAL SARDINE EXPERIENCE. People lie down in it like sardines as the lid is rolled up over them. The bowl SMASHES into it. ON THE MAYOR, as the bowl smashes into the stage and sends him FLYING.
ON SHAMO, screaming inside the bowl. ON THE CROWD, fleeing. ON BRENT, running with the giant ceremonial scissors. CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
I really shouldn't be running with these!
Flint and Steve RUN as the bowl bears down on them, but they aren't fast enough and give up -- only to be saved when the lip of the bowl rolls over them, leaving them unharmed.
Run, run, run, jump, jump, run, run, jump!

ON THE BOWL, as it continues on its path of destruction through Sardine Circle and people run SCREAMING. THE BOWL bounces through a parking lot, exploding a car which propels the bowl up in the air and throws Shamo through the flaming hoop and towards the ocean and freedom
(GURGLY) Yippee!

Then he's immediately SNATCHED UP by a flying ratbird. Then the bowl falls back to the ground, landing upside-down on top of Flint and Steve, trapping them inside. THROUGH THE GLASS BOWL, Flint sees all the destruction he caused.
(DEFEATED) Ay papi. Everyone stares at Flint. All incredibly angry.
The Mayor.
Brent. Cal and Earl.
(MUFFLED THROUGH GLASS) Flint

Then Flint sees a disappointed Tim. He looks at his dad, full of regret. Everyone turns their back on Flint, last of all, Tim. Flint hits his head against the glass in despair. Then... CRAAAACK! It sends a crack up to the top of the bowl and the whole thing shatters. Everyone turns and GASPS. Flint and Steve stare at the crowd, then quickly run away.
EXT. DOCKS - DAY
We find Flint, with Steve, hanging on the ladder at the end of the docks, hiding underneath. He SIGHS.
CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS

He hears footsteps, and hides... It's Sam, who walks to the end of the dock and SIGHS. She tosses her microphone ANGRILY into the water. Then she PLOPS down, and her heels kicks Flint in the eyes. Ow!
Oh my gosh! I am so sorry. Are you okay? I didn't get a chance to-It's okay.
It's just pain.
Sorry, I am not myself today. My whole career was ruined by some crazy jerk riding a homemade rocket.
Flint looks away suspiciously.
Wait a minute. (THEN) What is going on with your feet?
Spray-on shoes. off. They don't come
She grabs his foot and yanks it toward her until he's hanging upside down.
Cool! This could solve the untied shoes epidemic. What are they made of, some kind of elastic biopolymer adhesive?
Music plays as Flint gets all dreamy.
(SMITTEN) Yeah, exactly...
(SUDDENLY NERVOUS) I mean... (GIGGLES) Wow, they're shiny. (THEN) I'm Sam.
She lets go of his foot and his head slams into the ladder again, causing him to YELP. CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
(IN LOVE) Flint. Steve!
(EXCITED AGAIN) Is that a monkey thought translator? Steve. Ha!
Incredible!
Flint is just staring at her enchanted, DREAMY MUSIC playing...we can barely make out Sam putting it all together.
(DISTORTED) Did you make all of this stuff? (THEN, REALIZING) You hit me with the rocket!
MUSIC STOPS. Flint's caught.
You kicked me in the face!
I said I was sorry!... SPLAT.
Some yellow goop lands on the ladder. Steve licks it. Flint SNIFFS it and is about to taste when ZING! A PICKLE SLICE lands in the water. Sam notices none of this.
Oh! Do you know how hard it is to break into the weather game? I spent my entire life building up to that moment. You get one shot at the show...
ZING! Behind Flint, something lands in a garbage can on the docks, causing it to rattle. Flint gets up and walks to it.
(REALIZING SOMETHING'S AMISS) ...And if you don't make it, it's back to cleaning the barometers...
Flint looks into the garbage can. inside. He reaches for it. There's a SLICE OF CHEESE CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS Cheese?
Suddenly a ratbird appears from the shadows of the can, startling Flint. It snatches the cheese and flies away.
Flint starts to piece it together.
But that could only mean...
ROLLING THUNDER causes Flint to turn and look up at the sky.
Sam turns and reacts in the same way. <*GASP*>
Steve does the same.
All over town, people turn to the sky and react. <*GASP*>
(IN UNISON) <*GASP*>
Rufus takes off his hat, a woman takes off her glasses, Joe Towne takes off his beard.
JOE TOWNE
Earl, in his cop car, turns, rolls down his car window, then: CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF MEATBALLS
Back on the dock:
<*SUPER-LONG GASP*>
We finally reveal beautiful burger-shaped clouds dropping perfectly-prepared chesseburgers into the ocean and along the dock. It's RAINING CHEESEBURGERS!!!!
Happy! Cheeseburgers! Excited!
Jump! Flint stares to the heavens and LAUGHS as beautiful burgers float down all around them. A burger lands in his hand. He takes a delicious bite.
My machine works... It really works!
Sam overhears and approaches.
Your machine? rocket was? Is that what that
(MOUTH FULL) Uh... Do you like it?
(MOUTH FULL) I love it! (LAUGHS) This is just amazing! Look at this. This is the greatest weather phenomenon in history!
Flint is happy. Then, he realizes:
(MOUTH FULL) Hey, aren't you a weathergirl?
<*MOUTH FULL GASP*>
EXT. SWALLOW FALLS - SAME TIME

Sweeping shot over the town as burgers rain down. SAM (O.S.) Manny, get your camera! People slowly come out of hiding and start to enjoy the delicious burgers. All except -Tim, who stands inside the doorway of his shop and just stares at the sky in disbelief. Back in town, people CHEER!
INT. WNN NEWSDESK - MOMENTS LATER
The WNN Anchor touches his earpiece, getting a message from his producer.
This just in, our humiliated weather intern is apparently back for more.
EXT. SARDINE CIRCLE - CONTINUOUS
IN CAMERA: Burgers rain behind an excited Sam.
